G 18 RegistryOIML Term-Usage Registry
TermsTC / SCPublicationsEditionsHarmoniseID ConflictsDivergence
Registry / Terms / rated operating conditions

rated operating conditions

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #00377 · 57 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.5view ↗

conditions of use for which specified metrological characteristics of a measuring instrument are intended to lie within given limits

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.5
    conditions of use for which specified metrological characteristics of a measuring instrument are intended to lie within given limits
  • VIM 2007 · #4.9
    operating condition that must be fulfilled during *measurement* in order that a *measuring instrument* or *measuring system* perform as designed

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012. It may have been removed, renamed, or superseded by a different concept.
  2. MEDIUM 47 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. HIGH 10 diverge (ko).
  4. LOW 37 partially diverge.
